Arguments.query:
INSERT INTO lessons_learned (session_id, agent, topic, content, tags, metadata, importance)
VALUES (
  '3f944220-da04-42dc-a320-56efa1cdd793',
  'builder',
  'Dashboard Telemetry Timezone Alignment to PST',
  'Migrated telemetry boundaries and database comparison calculations from UTC midnight to Pacific Time (PST/PDT) calendar days. Solved by updating date bounds utility to dynamically evaluate the America/Los_Angeles timezone offset (PDT -7/PST -8) for the query date. Migrated database comparison function from CURRENT_DATE to CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE ''America/Los_Angeles''. This prevents call metric split issues across calendar days.',
  ARRAY['timezone', 'dst', 'ringcentral', 'postgres', 'supabase'],
  '{"files_modified": ["lib/ringcentral.ts"], "db_functions_updated": ["get_period_comparison"]}'::jsonb,
  5
);

args.toolSummary: Insert lesson learned record in Supabase database
